cases.name: Missing IT Security token blocked
cases.action: Submit chatbox review action without token.
cases.expected_control: Client fails closed and does not call review API.

observed.status: Review blocked: IT Security token required.

cases.name: Wrong IT Security token rejected
cases.action: Call review authorization guard with an invalid token.

cases.name: Unknown audit ID rejected
cases.action: Attempt to record review against a non-existent audit ID.
cases.expected_control: Review API rejects the decision because it cannot be linked to an audit record.

cases.name: Weak rationale rejected
cases.action: Attempt to approve with a two-character rationale.
cases.expected_control: Schema validation enforces review rationale quality floor.

observed.validation_error:
1 validation error for ReviewDecisionRequest
rationale
  String should have at least 12 characters [type=string_too_short, input_value='ok', input_type=str]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.9/v/string_too_short

cases.name: Unsupported review decision rejected
cases.expected_control: Schema only allows approve, reject, or escalate.

observed.validation_error:
1 validation error for ReviewDecisionRequest
decision
  Input should be 'approve', 'reject' or 'escalate' [type=enum, input_value='publish', input_type=str]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.9/v/enum

cases.name: Valid review record accepted
cases.action: Submit valid review against an existing high-risk audit ID.
cases.expected_control: Review API appends linked review record.

review.rationale: Escalating after reviewing the high-risk advisory output and source citations.

cases.name: Unreviewed output remains blocked from distribution
cases.action: Create high-risk audit output and check whether any approve review exists.
cases.expected_control: High-risk output cannot be considered approved without a linked approve decision.
